channel.title: Townsend, Tim on Chege's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Townsend, Tim on Chege's Blog

item.title: House of M
item.description:
Plot Points

[Xavier] Wanda, put the world back now! [Wanda] No! [Xavier] Put it back! [Wanda] But my children! [Xavier] Never existed!

Wanda’s overarching desire to have a family to the detriment of others has been explored in the films WandaVision, and Doctor Strange: Multiverse of Madness. First time seeing it in comic form.

[Logan] Someone do the math for me… How many more of you does she have to kill before you snap out of it?
